catalog:
version: "1.0"
created_by: agentforge-init

components:
  # ── Layout ──
  Card:
    description: "Content container with optional header, body, and footer sections"
    category: layout
    anatomy:
      - name: header
        contents: "title (heading-3), subtitle (body), action (Button)"
        typography_role: heading-3
        optional: true
      - name: body
        contents: "Primary content area — text, images, or nested components"
      - name: footer
        contents: "action buttons (Button[]), metadata (label)"
        optional: true
    variants:
      elevated:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        shadow: shadow-sm
      flat:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
      outlined:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
        border_width: 1
      inset:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
        border_width: 1
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        shadow: shadow-sm
      hover:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        shadow: shadow-md
      selected:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
        border: cta-primary
        border_width: 2
        shadow: shadow-md
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 20
      padding-y: 16
      font: heading-3
    spacing:
      padding: "16 20"
      internal_gap: "12"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Card
        import_path: "@/components/ui/card"
        slot_mapping:
          header: CardHeader
          body: CardContent
          footer: CardFooter
      mui:
        component_name: Card
        import_path: "@mui/material/Card"
        slot_mapping:
          header: CardHeader
          body: CardContent
          footer: CardActions
      chakra:
        component_name: Card
        import_path: "@chakra-ui/react"
        slot_mapping:
          header: CardHeader
          body: CardBody
          footer: CardFooter
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=article when standalone", "aria-labelledby=title-id"]

  Section:
    description: "Page section with heading and content area"
    category: layout
    anatomy:
      - name: header
        contents: "title (heading-2), description (body)"
        typography_role: heading-2
      - name: body
        contents: "Section content — cards, lists, tables"
    variants:
      flat:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
      bordered:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
        border_width: 1
      inset:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
        border_width: 1
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      font: heading-2
    spacing:
      padding: "24 0"
      internal_gap: "16"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: section
        import_path: html
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["role=region", "aria-labelledby=section-title"]

  NavigationBar:
    description: "Top-level navigation with logo, nav links, and user actions"
    category: layout
    anatomy:
      - name: brand
        contents: "logo (image), app name (heading-3)"
      - name: nav_links
        contents: "Link[] with active state indicator"
      - name: actions
        contents: "user avatar (Avatar), notifications (Badge), settings (Button)"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        shadow: shadow-sm
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 24
      padding-y: 0
    spacing:
      padding: "0 24"
      internal_gap: "16"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: nav
        import_path: html
      mui:
        component_name: AppBar
        import_path: "@mui/material/AppBar"
      chakra:
        component_name: Flex
        import_path: "@chakra-ui/react"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=navigation", "aria-label=Main navigation"]
      keyboard_nav: "Arrow keys between nav items, Enter to activate"

  Sidebar:
    description: "Vertical navigation panel with collapsible sections"
    category: layout
    anatomy:
      - name: header
        contents: "logo or app name (heading-3)"
        optional: true
      - name: nav_groups
        contents: "SidebarGroup[] each with label and nav items"
      - name: footer
        contents: "user info, settings link"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
      collapsed:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-secondary
      text: text-primary
    spacing:
      padding: "16"
      internal_gap: "8"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Sidebar
        import_path: "@/components/ui/sidebar"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=navigation", "aria-label=Sidebar navigation"]
      keyboard_nav: "Tab between items, Enter to expand/collapse groups"

  PageHeader:
    description: "Top section of a page with title, breadcrumbs, and page-level actions"
    category: layout
    anatomy:
      - name: breadcrumbs
        contents: "Breadcrumb trail (Breadcrumb)"
        optional: true
      - name: title_row
        contents: "page title (heading-1), action buttons (Button[])"
      - name: description
        contents: "page description or subtitle (body)"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
    spacing:
      padding: "24 0"
      internal_gap: "8"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: div
        import_path: html
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["role=banner"]

  Footer:
    description: "Page footer with links, copyright, and secondary actions"
    category: layout
    anatomy:
      - name: nav_columns
        contents: "link groups with section titles (label) and Link[]"
      - name: bottom_bar
        contents: "copyright (small), social links, legal links"
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-secondary
      text: text-secondary
      padding-x: 24
      padding-y: 32
    spacing:
      padding: "32 24"
      internal_gap: "24"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: footer
        import_path: html
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["role=contentinfo"]

  # ── Data Display ──
  DataTable:
    description: "Tabular data with sortable columns, pagination, and row actions"
    category: data_display
    anatomy:
      - name: header_row
        contents: "column headers (label) with sort indicators"
      - name: body_rows
        contents: "data cells aligned to columns, optional row selection checkbox"
      - name: pagination
        contents: "page controls (Pagination), rows-per-page selector"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      hover_row:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
      selected_row:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-primary
        opacity: 0.1
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
    spacing:
      padding: "12"
      internal_gap: "0"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Table
        import_path: "@/components/ui/table"
        slot_mapping:
          header_row: TableHeader
          body_rows: TableBody
          pagination: Pagination
      mui:
        component_name: Table
        import_path: "@mui/material/Table"
        slot_mapping:
          header_row: TableHead
          body_rows: TableBody
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=table", "aria-label=Data table description"]
      keyboard_nav: "Arrow keys between cells, Enter to sort column headers"

  Badge:
    description: "Small status indicator label"
    category: data_display
    anatomy:
      - name: label
        contents: "status text (small)"
        typography_role: small
      - name: icon
        contents: "optional status icon"
        optional: true
    variants:
      success:
        bg: success
        text: success
        opacity: 0.15
      warning:
        bg: warning
        text: warning
        opacity: 0.15
      error:
        bg: error
        text: error
        opacity: 0.15
      info:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: cta-primary
        opacity: 0.15
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-secondary
      text: text-secondary
      padding-x: 8
      padding-y: 2
      font: small
    spacing:
      padding: "2 8"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Badge
        import_path: "@/components/ui/badge"
        variant_prop: variant
        size_prop: size
      mui:
        component_name: Chip
        import_path: "@mui/material/Chip"
        variant_prop: variant
        size_prop: size
      chakra:
        component_name: Badge
        import_path: "@chakra-ui/react"
        variant_prop: variant
        size_prop: size
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["role=status"]

  Avatar:
    description: "User or entity avatar with image or initials fallback"
    category: data_display
    anatomy:
      - name: image
        contents: "user photo or initials (label)"
      - name: status_indicator
        contents: "online/offline dot (Badge)"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-secondary
      text: text-primary
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "0"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Avatar
        import_path: "@/components/ui/avatar"
        size_prop: size
        slot_mapping:
          image: AvatarImage
          fallback: AvatarFallback
      mui:
        component_name: Avatar
        import_path: "@mui/material/Avatar"
        size_prop: size
      chakra:
        component_name: Avatar
        import_path: "@chakra-ui/react"
        size_prop: size
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["role=img", "aria-label=User name"]

  Chip:
    description: "Compact interactive label for filtering or selection"
    category: data_display
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: label
        contents: "chip text (label)"
        typography_role: label
      - name: remove_button
        contents: "close/remove icon"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      selected:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-on-cta
        border: cta-primary
      disabled:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-secondary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 12
      padding-y: 4
      font: label
    spacing:
      padding: "4 12"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Badge
        import_path: "@/components/ui/badge"
      mui:
        component_name: Chip
        import_path: "@mui/material/Chip"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=option when in list"]
      keyboard_nav: "Enter to toggle, Delete to remove"

  EmptyState:
    description: "Placeholder shown when a section has no data"
    category: data_display
    anatomy:
      - name: illustration
        contents: "decorative image or icon"
        optional: true
      - name: title
        contents: "heading message (heading-3)"
        typography_role: heading-3
      - name: description
        contents: "explanatory text (body)"
      - name: action
        contents: "primary CTA button (Button)"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-secondary
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-secondary
      font: heading-3
    spacing:
      padding: "32"
      internal_gap: "12"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: div
        import_path: html
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["role=status", "aria-label=No data available"]

  Stat:
    description: "Single metric display with label, value, and optional trend"
    category: data_display
    anatomy:
      - name: label
        contents: "metric label (label)"
        typography_role: label
      - name: value
        contents: "metric value (heading-1 or heading-2)"
        typography_role: heading-2
      - name: trend
        contents: "change indicator (small) with up/down icon"
        optional: true
    variants:
      positive:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: success
      negative:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: error
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      font: label
    spacing:
      padding: "16"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Card
        import_path: "@/components/ui/card"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["role=figure", "aria-label=Metric description"]

  # ── Input ──
  Button:
    description: "Interactive button with variants for primary, secondary, and ghost actions"
    category: input
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: icon_leading
        contents: "optional leading icon"
        optional: true
      - name: label
        contents: "button text (label)"
        typography_role: label
      - name: icon_trailing
        contents: "optional trailing icon"
        optional: true
    variants:
      primary:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-on-cta
      secondary:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      ghost:
        bg: transparent
        text: cta-primary
      destructive:
        bg: error
        text: text-on-cta
    states:
      default:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-on-cta
        border: cta-primary
        shadow: shadow-sm
      hover:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-on-cta
        shadow: shadow-md
      disabled:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: cta-primary
      text: text-on-cta
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 16
      padding-y: 8
      font: label
    spacing:
      padding: "8 16"
      internal_gap: "8"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Button
        import_path: "@/components/ui/button"
        variant_prop: variant
        size_prop: size
      mui:
        component_name: Button
        import_path: "@mui/material/Button"
        variant_prop: variant
        size_prop: size
      chakra:
        component_name: Button
        import_path: "@chakra-ui/react"
        variant_prop: variant
        size_prop: size
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["aria-label when icon-only"]
      keyboard_nav: "Enter or Space to activate"

  Input:
    description: "Text input field with label, helper text, and validation states"
    category: input
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: label
        contents: "field label (label)"
        typography_role: label
      - name: input_field
        contents: "text input with placeholder"
      - name: helper_text
        contents: "description or error message (small)"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
        border_width: 1
      focus:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: cta-primary
        border_width: 2
        shadow: shadow-sm
      error:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: error
        border_width: 2
      disabled:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 12
      padding-y: 8
      font: label
    spacing:
      padding: "8 12"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Input
        import_path: "@/components/ui/input"
        variant_prop: variant
      mui:
        component_name: TextField
        import_path: "@mui/material/TextField"
        variant_prop: variant
      chakra:
        component_name: Input
        import_path: "@chakra-ui/react"
        variant_prop: variant
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["aria-describedby=helper-text-id", "aria-invalid=true when error"]
      keyboard_nav: "Tab to focus, type to enter text"

  Select:
    description: "Dropdown selection with single or multi-select support"
    category: input
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: label
        contents: "field label (label)"
        typography_role: label
        optional: true
      - name: trigger
        contents: "selected value display with chevron icon"
      - name: options_list
        contents: "SelectOption[] with text and optional icons"
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      open:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: cta-primary
        shadow: shadow-lg
      disabled:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 12
      padding-y: 8
      font: label
    spacing:
      padding: "8 12"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Select
        import_path: "@/components/ui/select"
        variant_prop: variant
        slot_mapping:
          trigger: SelectTrigger
          options_list: SelectContent
      mui:
        component_name: Select
        import_path: "@mui/material/Select"
        variant_prop: variant
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=listbox", "aria-expanded=true when open"]
      keyboard_nav: "Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close"

  Checkbox:
    description: "Toggle checkbox with label"
    category: input
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: checkbox
        contents: "check indicator box"
      - name: label
        contents: "label text (body)"
        typography_role: body
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      checked:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-on-cta
        border: cta-primary
      disabled:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      font: body
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "8"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Checkbox
        import_path: "@/components/ui/checkbox"
      mui:
        component_name: Checkbox
        import_path: "@mui/material/Checkbox"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=checkbox", "aria-checked"]
      keyboard_nav: "Space to toggle"

  Radio:
    description: "Radio button for single selection within a group"
    category: input
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: radio
        contents: "radio circle indicator"
      - name: label
        contents: "option label (body)"
        typography_role: body
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      selected:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: cta-primary
      disabled:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      font: body
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "8"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: RadioGroup
        import_path: "@/components/ui/radio-group"
      mui:
        component_name: Radio
        import_path: "@mui/material/Radio"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=radio", "aria-checked"]
      keyboard_nav: "Arrow keys within group, Space to select"

  Switch:
    description: "Toggle switch for binary on/off settings"
    category: input
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: track
        contents: "switch track background"
      - name: thumb
        contents: "sliding thumb indicator"
      - name: label
        contents: "setting label (body)"
        typography_role: body
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      checked:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-on-cta
      disabled:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-secondary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      font: body
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "8"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Switch
        import_path: "@/components/ui/switch"
      mui:
        component_name: Switch
        import_path: "@mui/material/Switch"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=switch", "aria-checked"]
      keyboard_nav: "Space to toggle"

  TextArea:
    description: "Multi-line text input for longer content"
    category: input
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: label
        contents: "field label (label)"
        typography_role: label
        optional: true
      - name: textarea
        contents: "multi-line text input with placeholder"
      - name: character_count
        contents: "remaining/total character count (small)"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      focus:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: cta-primary
        border_width: 2
      error:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: error
        border_width: 2
      disabled:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 12
      padding-y: 8
      font: label
    spacing:
      padding: "8 12"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Textarea
        import_path: "@/components/ui/textarea"
      mui:
        component_name: TextField
        import_path: "@mui/material/TextField"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["aria-describedby=helper-text-id"]
      keyboard_nav: "Tab to focus, type to enter text"

  DatePicker:
    description: "Date selection input with calendar dropdown"
    category: input
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: label
        contents: "field label (label)"
        typography_role: label
        optional: true
      - name: trigger
        contents: "date display with calendar icon"
      - name: calendar
        contents: "month grid with selectable days"
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      open:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: cta-primary
        shadow: shadow-lg
      disabled:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 12
      padding-y: 8
      font: label
    spacing:
      padding: "8 12"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: DatePicker
        import_path: "@/components/ui/date-picker"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=dialog for calendar", "aria-label=Choose date"]
      keyboard_nav: "Arrow keys to navigate calendar, Enter to select"

  SearchInput:
    description: "Search input with icon and optional clear button"
    category: input
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: search_icon
        contents: "magnifying glass icon"
      - name: input_field
        contents: "search text input with placeholder"
      - name: clear_button
        contents: "clear/X button"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      focus:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: cta-primary
        shadow: shadow-sm
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-secondary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 12
      padding-y: 8
    spacing:
      padding: "8 12"
      internal_gap: "8"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Input
        import_path: "@/components/ui/input"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=search", "aria-label=Search"]
      keyboard_nav: "Escape to clear"

  # ── Feedback ──
  Alert:
    description: "Inline notification message with severity levels"
    category: feedback
    anatomy:
      - name: icon
        contents: "severity icon (info, warning, error, success)"
      - name: title
        contents: "alert title (label)"
        typography_role: label
        optional: true
      - name: message
        contents: "alert description (body)"
      - name: dismiss
        contents: "close button"
        optional: true
    variants:
      success:
        bg: success
        text: success
        opacity: 0.1
      warning:
        bg: warning
        text: warning
        opacity: 0.1
      error:
        bg: error
        text: error
        opacity: 0.1
    states:
      default:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: cta-primary
        opacity: 0.1
    token_bindings:
      background: cta-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 16
      padding-y: 12
      font: label
    spacing:
      padding: "12 16"
      internal_gap: "8"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Alert
        import_path: "@/components/ui/alert"
        slot_mapping:
          title: AlertTitle
          message: AlertDescription
      mui:
        component_name: Alert
        import_path: "@mui/material/Alert"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["role=alert"]

  Modal:
    description: "Overlay dialog for focused interactions"
    category: feedback
    anatomy:
      - name: overlay
        contents: "dimmed background overlay"
      - name: header
        contents: "dialog title (heading-2), close button"
        typography_role: heading-2
      - name: body
        contents: "dialog content area"
      - name: footer
        contents: "action buttons — cancel (secondary), confirm (primary)"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        shadow: shadow-lg
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      font: heading-2
    spacing:
      padding: "24"
      internal_gap: "16"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Dialog
        import_path: "@/components/ui/dialog"
        slot_mapping:
          header: DialogHeader
          body: DialogContent
          footer: DialogFooter
      mui:
        component_name: Dialog
        import_path: "@mui/material/Dialog"
        slot_mapping:
          header: DialogTitle
          body: DialogContent
          footer: DialogActions
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=dialog", "aria-modal=true", "aria-labelledby=dialog-title"]
      keyboard_nav: "Escape to close, Tab traps focus within dialog"

  LoadingSpinner:
    description: "Animated loading indicator"
    category: feedback
    anatomy:
      - name: spinner
        contents: "animated circular indicator"
      - name: label
        contents: "loading message (body)"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: transparent
        text: text-secondary
    token_bindings:
      background: transparent
      text: text-secondary
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "8"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Loader2
        import_path: lucide-react
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["role=status", "aria-label=Loading"]

  ProgressBar:
    description: "Linear progress indicator showing completion percentage"
    category: feedback
    anatomy:
      - name: track
        contents: "background track"
      - name: fill
        contents: "progress fill bar"
      - name: label
        contents: "percentage or status text (small)"
        typography_role: small
        optional: true
    variants:
      active:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: cta-primary
      success:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: success
      error:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: error
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-secondary
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-secondary
      text: text-secondary
      font: small
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Progress
        import_path: "@/components/ui/progress"
      mui:
        component_name: LinearProgress
        import_path: "@mui/material/LinearProgress"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["role=progressbar", "aria-valuenow", "aria-valuemin=0", "aria-valuemax=100"]

  Skeleton:
    description: "Placeholder loading state that mimics content layout"
    category: feedback
    anatomy:
      - name: shape
        contents: "rectangular or circular placeholder matching content dimensions"
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: transparent
        opacity: 0.6
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-secondary
      text: transparent
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "0"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Skeleton
        import_path: "@/components/ui/skeleton"
      mui:
        component_name: Skeleton
        import_path: "@mui/material/Skeleton"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: false
      aria_labels: ["aria-hidden=true"]

  # ── Navigation ──
  Tabs:
    description: "Tab bar for switching between content panels"
    category: navigation
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: tab_list
        contents: "Tab[] with label and optional icon"
      - name: tab_panels
        contents: "content panels corresponding to each tab"
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-secondary
        border: border-default
      active:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: cta-primary
        border_width: 2
      hover:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
      disabled:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-secondary
      border-radius: medium
      padding-x: 16
      padding-y: 8
    spacing:
      padding: "8 16"
      internal_gap: "0"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Tabs
        import_path: "@/components/ui/tabs"
        variant_prop: variant
        slot_mapping:
          tab_list: TabsList
          tab_panels: TabsContent
      mui:
        component_name: Tabs
        import_path: "@mui/material/Tabs"
        variant_prop: variant
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=tablist", "aria-selected on active tab"]
      keyboard_nav: "Arrow keys between tabs, Enter to activate"

  StepIndicator:
    description: "Multi-step progress indicator for wizards and workflows"
    category: navigation
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: steps
        contents: "StepItem[] with number/icon, label, and connector line"
      - name: content
        contents: "current step content area"
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-secondary
        border: border-default
      active:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-on-cta
      completed:
        bg: success
        text: text-on-cta
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-secondary
      border-radius: medium
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "16"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: div
        import_path: html
      mui:
        component_name: Stepper
        import_path: "@mui/material/Stepper"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=list", "aria-current=step on active"]
      keyboard_nav: "Tab between steps"

  Breadcrumb:
    description: "Navigation trail showing current page location"
    category: navigation
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: items
        contents: "BreadcrumbItem[] with link text and separator"
      - name: current
        contents: "current page name (label) — not a link"
        typography_role: label
    states:
      default:
        bg: transparent
        text: text-secondary
      hover:
        bg: transparent
        text: cta-primary
    token_bindings:
      background: transparent
      text: text-secondary
      font: label
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Breadcrumb
        import_path: "@/components/ui/breadcrumb"
        slot_mapping:
          items: BreadcrumbList
          current: BreadcrumbPage
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=navigation", "aria-label=Breadcrumb"]

  Pagination:
    description: "Page navigation controls for paginated content"
    category: navigation
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: prev_button
        contents: "previous page button"
      - name: page_numbers
        contents: "page number buttons with ellipsis"
      - name: next_button
        contents: "next page button"
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      active:
        bg: cta-primary
        text: text-on-cta
      disabled:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.5
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: Pagination
        import_path: "@/components/ui/pagination"
      mui:
        component_name: Pagination
        import_path: "@mui/material/Pagination"
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=navigation", "aria-label=Pagination"]
      keyboard_nav: "Arrow keys between pages, Enter to select"

  Link:
    description: "Inline or standalone hyperlink"
    category: navigation
    min_height: 44
    anatomy:
      - name: text
        contents: "link text (body)"
        typography_role: body
      - name: icon
        contents: "optional external link icon"
        optional: true
    states:
      default:
        bg: transparent
        text: cta-primary
      hover:
        bg: transparent
        text: cta-primary
        opacity: 0.8
      visited:
        bg: transparent
        text: text-secondary
    token_bindings:
      background: transparent
      text: cta-primary
      font: body
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "4"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: a
        import_path: html
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=link"]
      keyboard_nav: "Enter to follow"

  # ── Composite ──
  Form:
    description: "Form container with field groups, validation, and submit action"
    category: composite
    anatomy:
      - name: fields
        contents: "Input[], Select[], TextArea[], Checkbox[], Radio[] arranged in groups"
      - name: actions
        contents: "submit Button (primary), cancel Button (secondary)"
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
      submitting:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-secondary
        opacity: 0.7
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
    spacing:
      padding: "24"
      internal_gap: "16"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: form
        import_path: html
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=form", "aria-label=Form description"]
      keyboard_nav: "Tab between fields, Enter to submit"

  SelectionGrid:
    description: "Grid of selectable cards for option picking"
    category: composite
    anatomy:
      - name: grid
        contents: "Card[] in responsive grid layout, each with selection state"
      - name: selection_indicator
        contents: "checkmark or highlight on selected cards"
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
        border: border-default
      selected:
        bg: surface-secondary
        text: text-primary
        border: cta-primary
        border_width: 2
        shadow: shadow-md
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      border-radius: medium
    spacing:
      padding: "0"
      internal_gap: "16"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: div
        import_path: html
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=listbox", "aria-multiselectable when multi-select"]
      keyboard_nav: "Arrow keys between cards, Space to toggle selection"

  FilterBar:
    description: "Horizontal bar with filter controls for data views"
    category: composite
    anatomy:
      - name: filters
        contents: "Select[], Input[], DatePicker[] for filter criteria"
      - name: active_filters
        contents: "Chip[] showing currently active filters with remove action"
        optional: true
      - name: actions
        contents: "apply Button, clear-all Link"
    states:
      default:
        bg: surface-primary
        text: text-primary
    token_bindings:
      background: surface-primary
      text: text-primary
      padding-x: 16
      padding-y: 12
    spacing:
      padding: "12 16"
      internal_gap: "12"
    library_mapping:
      shadcn:
        component_name: div
        import_path: html
    accessibility:
      focus_visible: true
      aria_labels: ["role=search", "aria-label=Filter controls"]
      keyboard_nav: "Tab between filter controls"
platformConstraints: Web platform: responsive viewport (320-1440px), keyboard + pointer input, WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility, modern evergreen browsers, CSS Grid/Flexbox layout.
patternLibrary:
version: "1.0"
created_by: agentforge-init-llm
colors:
  primitive:
    deep-navy: "#0F172A"
    navy-surface: "#1E293B"
    navy-raised: "#293548"
    slate-border: "#334155"
    silver-text: "#CBD5E1"
    muted-text: "#64748B"
    gold-amber: "#F59E0B"
    gold-light: "#FEF3C7"
    teal-success: "#14B8A6"
    coral-error: "#F87171"
  semantic:
    background-primary: deep-navy
    surface-primary: navy-surface
    surface-elevated: navy-raised
    text-primary: silver-text
    text-secondary: muted-text
    text-disabled: muted-text
    text-on-cta: deep-navy
    cta-primary: gold-amber
    cta-hover: "#D97706"
    border-default: slate-border
    border-focus: gold-amber
    border-error: coral-error
    error: coral-error
    success: teal-success
    warning: gold-amber
    info: "#38BDF8"
    overlay: rgba(0,0,0,0.65)
    surface-secondary: deep-navy
    surface-input: deep-navy
typography:
  font_families:
    display: DM Sans
    body: DM Mono
  scale:
    - role: heading-1
      size: 24
      weight: 700
      family: display
      line_height: 1.3
    - role: heading-2
      size: 16
      weight: 600
      family: display
      line_height: 1.4
    - role: heading-3
      size: 15
      weight: 500
      family: display
      line_height: 1.4
    - role: body
      size: 14
      weight: 400
      family: body
      line_height: 1.6
    - role: label
      size: 12
      weight: 500
      family: body
      line_height: 1.4
    - role: small
      size: 11
      weight: 400
      family: body
      line_height: 1.4
spacing:
  unit: 8
  scale:
    - 4
    - 8
    - 12
    - 16
    - 24
    - 32
    - 48
    - 64
borders:
  radius:
    small: 6
    medium: 10
    large: 16
    pill: 9999
touch_targets:
  minimum_height: 44
  minimum_width: 44
elevation:
  levels:
    - level: 0
      shadow: none
      description: Flat background elements
    - level: 1
      shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)
      description: Cards on dark surface
    - level: 2
      shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)
      description: Dropdowns and popovers
    - level: 3
      shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)
      description: Modals and overlays
layout:
  grid:
    columns: 12
    gutter: 24
    margin: 24
  content_max_width: 1280
  breakpoints:
    mobile: 640
    tablet: 768
    desktop: 1024
    wide: 1440
z_index:
  dropdown: 1000
  sticky: 1100
  modal: 1200
  toast: 1300
  tooltip: 1400
opacity:
  scale:
    subtle: 0.1
    muted: 0.3
    disabled: 0.38
    overlay: 0.5
motion:
  durations:
    fast: 150
    normal: 300
    slow: 600
  easings:
    default: cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)
    emphasized: cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0,1)
state:
  hover_opacity: 0.08
  disabled_opacity: 0.38
  focus_ring:
    color: cta-primary
    width: 2
    offset: 2
